Rewrote the first draft (was serp 39 / 2,640w) to serp 94 / 4,600w with real depth: per-area things-to-do, a West Side section, a types-of-stay table, an itinerary, best-beaches + more-rain Q-sections. CARD FIX: 6 of the 9 original cards (Whalers Cove, Hanalei Bay Resort, Hanalei Colony, Fern Grotto Inn, Pono Kai, Timbers) returned NO live rate on /api/prices (peak AND shoulder) — swapped for the verified marquees the SERP wanted anyway (Grand Hyatt, Sheraton, 1 Hotel Hanalei Bay, Hilton Garden Inn, Kauai Shores). Heading 100%, slop 0 HARD, checklist 24/24, check 2/2. Lighthouse perf 86 / a11y 97 = the site-wide baseline (live Maui post scores 89/97 identically — external on-demand cover LCP + shared card muted-text contrast, not a content defect).
